title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account despite resetting the password multiple times.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted to pay using Visa ending in 1234 but the payment keeps failing.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer’s billing address shows an outdated city even after updating profile information.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund 7 days ago but has not received confirmation yet.

title: Subscription Cancellation Issue
description: Customer tried cancelling subscription but system still shows active status.

title: Account Verification Email Not Received
description: Customer did not receive verification email after multiple resend attempts.

title: Website Loading Slowly
description: Customer reports that dashboard takes too long to load after login.

title: Error 500 on Checkout
description: Internal server error appears when customer tries to complete checkout.

title: Profile Picture Upload Failed
description: Customer cannot upload profile picture; system shows unsupported format error.

title: Discount Code Not Working
description: Promo code WINTER24 does not apply discount during checkout.

title: Mobile App Crashing
description: App crashes immediately after opening on Android version 13 devices.
